definitions.text: slenge eller vri brått på kroppen
definitions.translation: suddenly move or twist the body

examples.no: straks telefonen ringte kaster hun seg over den
examples.en: as soon as the phone rang, she threw herself at it

examples.no: han lå og kastet seg i sengen hele natten
examples.en: he lay tossing and turning in bed all night
the keeper threw himself on the ball
